source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In the circuit shown in figure, given \( R = 6 \Omega \), when the voltage \( u = 12 \sqrt{2} \sin(200t + 30^\circ) \) V, the effective value of the voltage at the inductance \( L \) terminal is measured to be \( U_L = 6 \sqrt{2} \) V. The inductance \( L \) is ( )mH.
